# iappstores

> iappstores is a public browser for AltStore and SideStore-compatible iOS app repositories, direct IPA download metadata, repository notes, and App Store context when available.

Important notes:

- iappstores indexes third-party repository metadata and links to original source download URLs. It does not host IPA files, verify authenticity, or review apps for malware or privacy impact.
- Repository notes are preserved because they often describe tweaked, modded, patched, or subscription-unlocked builds. Treat those notes as source-provided claims, not official App Store descriptions.
- App Store metadata, when available, is supplemental context from Apple's public lookup API and should not replace repository-specific IPA details.
- Duplicate bundle identifiers may be grouped into one app page with multiple source download options.

## Primary Pages

- [Home and app browser](https://iappstores.com/): Search and filter indexed IPA repository listings by app name, bundle ID, developer, source, category, and minimum iOS version.
- [Sitemap](https://iappstores.com/sitemap.xml): Discover public app detail pages generated from indexed bundle identifiers.
- [Robots](https://iappstores.com/robots.txt): Crawling guidance for the site.

## API

- [Sources API](https://iappstores.com/api/sources): JSON list of indexed repository sources.
- [Apps API](https://iappstores.com/api/apps): Paginated JSON list of grouped apps across sources. Supports filters such as `sourceId`, `category`, `iosVersion`, `iosVersionOperator`, `page`, `pageSize`, and `includeAppStore`.
- [Search API](https://iappstores.com/api/search?q=delta): Paginated JSON search across app names, bundle IDs, developers, subtitles, descriptions, and versions.
- [Sitemap Apps API](https://iappstores.com/api/sitemap/apps): Compact JSON list of app ids, bundle identifiers, and version dates used to build the sitemap.

## URL Patterns

- [App detail page](https://iappstores.com/apps/com.example.bundle): Replace `com.example.bundle` with a bundle identifier or encoded app id to view a shareable app page.
- [Source-filtered app API](https://iappstores.com/api/sources/fastsign-altstore/apps): Replace `fastsign-altstore` with a source id from the Sources API to list apps from one repository.

## Optional

- [llms.txt specification](https://llmstxt.org/): Informal proposal for the `/llms.txt` Markdown format.
